title: Garagedoor controller

diagComments.excerpt:
## Fingerprint Status

`_TZE204_nklqjk62` / `TS0601` is **already supported** in the **door_controller** driver.

Since you report it pairs but has missing features, please:
1. Enable debug logging in Homey Developer Tools
2. Operate the garage door controller physically and via the Tuya app
3. Share the diagnostic report ID here

This will help identify which Tuya DPs need additional mapping for your device.
